calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2007 Off Calendar

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-10-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Linda Chavez.
Niki Okcu, Esq. for Petitioner: Leslie Cotchett, present as Guardian ad litem for: Lauren Cotchett, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Medical Expenses $320.00
Costs $680.00
A net balance of $2,000.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with First Community Bank, 6580 Oakmont Dr., Santa Rosa, CA. 95409, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2007 Continued To Apr-19-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
